case_title: JOHN PHELPS VS. DOE 1 et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHELPS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DOE 1 LOGORECI, LORENZO GROUPO RISTORANTE ITALIANO, LLC GROUPO RISTORANTE ITALIANO, INC. DOES 2 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-08-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-05-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-23-2013
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
